name: project-loop-methodology
description: Four phase-aware diagnostic agents that critique any project or portfolio through five PM conceptual lenses (project loop, outcome altitude, project constraint cascade, stakeholder priority budget, project lifecycle). Agents detect which lifecycle phase the project is in (charter / plan / execute / adjust / replan) and compose the right skill chain — the same lens reads very differently per phase. Ships five canonical PM lens docs + 11 composable skills so the methodology travels with the plugin into any consumer project.
